data.XP 不像 Win7 用 UefiSeven；UEFI 启动依赖映像内预置的 w:
Unlike Win7, XP does not use UefiSeven; UEFI boot relies on the preset winload.efi/modified kernel and bootxp64.efi/BCC inside the image.
During installation, these boot files are automatically deployed to the ESP and the BCC partition references are corrected.

data.使用开源项目 UefiSeven 修补 Win7 UEFI 启动问题。\nWin:
Uses the open-source project UefiSeven to patch Win7 UEFI boot issues.
Win7's boot loader does not fully support UEFI Class 3 systems, which may cause:
• Getting stuck at the "Starting Windows" screen at startup
• Error code 0xc000000d
This option automatically deploys the UefiSeven boot loader after installation completes.
